untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle is a visual pattern recognition signal requiring shape analysis (rounded cup formation, uneven rims, handle bump) that cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicator thresholds. Pattern detection requires historical price contour analysis, which is not supported by the allowed indicator set. Additionally, Fibonacci retrace level 62% and handle retrace validation require multi-point pattern geometry measurement beyond single-bar indicator capabilities.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Bollinger Band position (bb_pct_b) to detect cup-like consolidation and pivot support (s1) for breakout confirmation, but this does not capture the essential pattern morphology. The signal requires dedicated pattern recognition logic outside the scope of standard technical indicators.
